structured.title: Rachel Discusses Routine And Library Access
structured.overview: A casual conversation about how a fixed work routine reduces mental stress and makes planning easier, compared with the unpredictability of previous work. The user asks Rachel to speak with Marnie about alumni access to the library after study, including whether continued access must be paid for and whether it could be useful for ministry and work. The exchange ends with brief everyday chatter and a reminder about the time.
